message:
fix(setup): Fix TypeScript errors in setup routes and service

- Fix sendNotFound calls to include resourceType and identifier params
- Remove non-existent broadcastToSession method (WS progress is future enhancement)
- Fix InstallResult type errors with optional version/path properties
- Remove unused imports (getHub, DetectionResult)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
